docs.title: Documentation
docs.mission_desc: Why Parahub exists and what problem it solves
docs.features_desc: A complete overview of platform capabilities
docs.barter_desc: Exchange without money, even without a direct match
docs.wot_desc: Trust without passports — how it works
docs.crypto_desc: PGP signatures and Bitcoin anchoring — proofs that exist without the platform
docs.ads_desc: Advertisers pay viewers directly — no platform middleman
docs.mesh_desc: Plug in a router, share Wi-Fi, earn via Lightning
docs.arbitration_desc: What to do when a deal goes wrong
docs.conduct_desc: Community rules: what's allowed and what isn't
docs.tech_desc: Open stack — the technology under the hood
docs.energy_desc: Sell solar surplus to neighbors — bypassing the grid middleman
docs.federation_desc: Run your own instance and stay connected — Git-based inter-node protocol
docs.transparency_desc: How Parahub earns money and where it goes — full openness
docs.governance_desc: Vote directly or delegate to someone you trust
docs.getting_started_desc: First steps: from registration to your first deal
docs.condo_desc: Free digital management for residential buildings — Lei 8/2022 compliant
docs.voice_desc: Talk to AI assistants using your voice — natural conversation in your browser
docs.phub_desc: Send parcels through trusted community members — no couriers, no middlemen
docs.transit_ops_desc: Create routes, assign vehicles, export GTFS — transit management for agencies
docs.tickets_desc: Buy digital tickets for events and transit with instant Lightning payments
docs.driver_desc: Broadcast your live GPS position while driving a transit route
docs.parasos_desc: Press one button — your neighbors arrive in 2 minutes
docs.intro: Concepts and principles that make Parahub different from other platforms
docs.subscriptions_desc: Back a creator every month — direct, non-custodial, no platform cut
docs.rental_desc: Book by the day or by the slot — availability that can't double-book
docs.marketplace_desc: Offer or request anything — direct P2P trade, no platform fees
docs.directory_desc: Find local businesses and organizations on the map

footer.description: Decentralized P2P cooperation platform for direct trade, communications, and community interactions.

error.generic: An error occurred during authorization. Please try again.

error.invalid_credentials: Incorrect username or password. Please try again.
error.account_disabled: This account has been deactivated. Contact support for help.
error.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

choose_username.title: Choose Your Username
choose_username.subtitle: This will be your identity on Parahub
choose_username.save_credentials_desc: You can use this password to sign in without Google.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Parahub
onboarding.intro: A decentralized platform for direct trade, cooperation, and community — without middlemen.
onboarding.action_profile_desc: Set up your identity and tell others what you offer
onboarding.action_directory_desc: Find local businesses and community services
onboarding.action_market_desc: Discover goods and services from the community
onboarding.wot_hint: Get verified by 3+ community members to unlock all features. This is how trust works here — no passports, no corporations.

register.email_taken: This email already has an account. Try signing in — or use Google if that's how you signed up.
register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: No Google required — your identity, your rules
register.email_hint: Leave empty to use your Parahub address (username{'@'}parahub.io)
register.pow_hint: This replaces CAPTCHA — runs locally, no data sent anywhere
register.success_desc: You can now sign in with your username and password.
register.disabled_desc: Direct registration is currently disabled. Sign in with Google or use an invite link.
